    Good Food Backed by Proof

    Independently tested and certified to be completely free from glyphosate, a harmful weedicide linked to serious health risks and banned in 20+ countries.

    Our facility follows internationally recognized standards for cleanliness, safety, and quality at every step of the manufacturing process.

    A globally respected food safety certification that guarantees our processes, ingredients, and packaging meet the highest international standards for safe, quality food production.

    A2 Cow Ghee

    Love the texture and taste - just like the ghee my grandma made. Took me straight back to childhood. Gir cow ghee is known for its rich flavour and benefits, and this is exactly that.

    Ruchi Patel

    Khapli Wheat Atta

    Within 3 months of switching to TBOF atta and millets - my husband’s health improved significantly. Grateful to you all for reminding us that food can truly be powerful.

    Sravyasri Adepu

    Sugarcane Jaggery Block

    Ordered the jaggery blocks - they arrived well packed. Once stored, you can immediately feel the pure, chemical-free aroma. I’ll definitely be ordering more.

    Vikrant Dsolva

    Moringa Powder

    I bought this for my insulin resistance and overall health.. Its been quite sometime that I am consuming this and honestly I feel it has helped with my overall health and insulin resistance.

    Ruchee

    Amla pickle

    The robust amla flavour bursts quietly in every bite. These tiny aamlas are delicious and warm, taking me back to my Kaki’s mouth-watering Aamla pickle.

    Sonali nimish

    Lemon pickle

    The lemon pickle tastes truly homemade and takes me back to childhood. Perfectly balanced, free from additives, and doesn’t cause acidity - unlike most pickles in the market.

    Aniruddha Tewari

    Peanut Butter Crunchy with Jaggery

    I’ve been having this peanut butter for two weeks, and it’s the best organic one I’ve tried - natural taste, nutrient-rich. If you hit the gym, this is a must-have.

    Ajinkya R

    Truemato Ketchup

    Absolutely love this! Not just ketchup - a real food upgrade. Honest ingredients, no shortcuts. Finally, something we can feel good feeding our families.

    Anand M

    Chyawanprash

    I must have tried 15 different Chyawanprash brands and this one is the king and queen of them all

    Maya Madne

    Gulkand

    Tried the delicious organic gulkand and loved it. Rich, fragnant and not too sweet and it's made from quality rose petals. It tastes great and also helps with the digestion

    Rashmi Kumar

    Nithin Kamath

    Founder, Rainmatter

    At Rainmatter Health, we care deeply about what we eat. Two Brothers Organic Farms stood out—clean food, deep purpose, and a clear mission to support farmer livelihoods. We’re investors, but also proud customers.

    ANAND S AHUJA

    Founder Bhaane

    Pure love, pure taste, pure intention. Every product from Two Brothers feels authentic and full of heart—from how it’s grown to how it tastes. It inspires mindful consumption.

    Mira Kapoor

    India

    One of the few brands that makes ghee the traditional way—from dahi, not malai. That alone won me over. Delicious, wholesome, and always a repeat buy.

    Akshay Kumar

    Bollywood Superstar, India

    I’m thrilled to support Two Brothers Organic Farms in their journey towards a healthier, cleaner India. What they stand for is exactly what our future needs.

    VIRENDER SEHWAG

    Indian Cricketer

    I’ve been personally consuming their products and even spent an entire day at their farms. It’s rare to see this level of honesty and commitment in farming today.

    Added to Cart!
